unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Match the school subjects in the box with the pictures: art, biology, Chinese, IT, English, geography, history, maths, music, PE.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: bio (生命) + logy (学科)，研究生命的学科。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Peter has IT and PE today.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: I (信息) + T (技术)，两个字母缩写。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have art and geography. I like those subjects too.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: geo (地球) + graphy (描写)，描写地球的学科。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I have history on Tuesday mornings.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: his (他的) + tory (故事)，他的故事就是历史。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 乏味的; 令人生厌的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because maths is boring to me.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: bore (令人厌烦) + ing，形容事物令人无聊。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 有用的; 有益的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My favourite subject is English. It's useful, and my English teacher is really nice.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: use (使用) + ful (充满)，充满用处的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 令人激动的; 使人兴奋的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: PE, because it's exciting.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: excite (使兴奋) + ing，形容事物令人兴奋。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 过去; 过去的事情
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's interesting to learn about the past.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: pass (经过) + t，经过的事情就是过去。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: 灵巧的; 善于应付……的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because I'm good with numbers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: good (好的) + with (对于)，对...很在行。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because I'm good with numbers.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: num (数) + ber，数字。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Can you help me with this subject?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: help (帮助) + with (在...方面)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Read the conversation and complete the table: Name, Favourite subject, Reason.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: rea (读作'理') + son (儿子)，理由之子。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: She likes to listen to music and draw pictures.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: listen (听) + to (向)，仔细地听。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He is good at English, and he often helps me with my English.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: good (好) + at (在)，在某方面好。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Sometimes it's difficult to remember all the information.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: re (再) + member (成员)，再次想起成员=记住。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: prep. 如同; 作为 conj. 当……时; 由于
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Who likes the same subjects as you and why?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: as 很短但意思多：作为、像、当...时。
拉丁语 ante meridiem (中午前)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Class (PM): 5, 6, 7.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: 拉丁语 post meridiem (中午后)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 法语 adj. 法国的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I study maths, music, French, history, English, IT, science, and have gym.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: France (法国) 的形容词形式。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 优秀的; 极好的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My music teacher is excellent.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: excel (优秀) + lent，特别优秀的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 乐器; 器械; 工具
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: He lets us play all kinds of interesting instruments.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in + stru (结构) + ment，有结构的工具/乐器。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I want to be a singer in the future.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sing (唱歌) + er (人)，唱歌的人。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I want to be a singer in the future.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: fu (赴) + ture，赴往未来。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I want to be a scientist in the future.
unit_vocabulary.comparison: in the future vs in the past
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in (在) + the future (未来)。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: This term, I have subjects like Chinese, history, maths, English, PE, and IT.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: ter (学) + m，一段学期。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We learn how to work out maths problems in class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: work (工作) + out (出)，算出结果。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We learn how to work out maths problems in class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: pro (专业) + blem，专业难题。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: We learn how to work out maths problems in class.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: in (在) + class (课堂)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: n. 魔法; 魔力 adj. 有魔力的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It feels like magic and is really fun.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: mag (大的) + ic，大力量 = 魔法。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Maths is very useful in our life.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: l + ife，生活和生命。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I want to be a scientist in the future.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: science (科学) + tist (人)，搞科学的人。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Oh, it's difficult for me. Can you help me with this subject?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: diffi (困) + cult (难)。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 有趣的; 令人感兴趣的
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: It's interesting to learn about the past.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: interest (兴趣) + ing，令人感兴趣的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 最喜爱的 n. 最喜欢的人或物
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What's your favourite subject?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: fav (宠爱) + ourite，最宠爱的。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: What's your favourite subject?
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: sub (在下面) + ject (投射)，被投射的主题/学科。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I like Chinese because it's fun.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: be (是) + cause (原因)，是因为。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: I'm very busy this year.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: bus (公交) + y，公交一样忙碌。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: My favourite subject is music because the class is fun and we learn a lot of new songs.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: s + ong，用 sing 唱出 song。

unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: No, it's hard for me.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: h + ard，硬的和困难的。

unit_vocabulary.meaning: adj. 有趣的 n. 乐趣
unit_vocabulary.context_sentence: Because it's fun.
unit_vocabulary.memorization_hook: f + un，有趣的事情。
